title: trigonotis vestita
intro: Trigonotis vestita is a perennial herb belonging to the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the 'Creeping Fumewort'. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Trigonotis vestita include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and improve digestion. The herbal preparations of Trigonotis vestita include tea, decoctions, and infusions, which are often used to treat coughs, colds, and other respiratory infections.
